subject: Q3 Budget Review - Action Required by Friday
body:
Hi,

I need you to review the attached Q3 budget spreadsheet and send me your department's numbers by end of day Friday. The CFO is presenting to the board on Monday and we cannot be late.

Specifically, I need:
1. Headcount costs for Q3
2. Software licensing renewals
3. Any planned capital expenditures

If you have questions, ping me on Slack.

Thanks,
Sarah

subject: This Week in AI: GPT-5, open source models, and more
body:
Good morning!

Here's your weekly roundup of what's happening in tech:

• OpenAI announced GPT-5 with improved reasoning
• Meta released a new open-source LLM under MIT license
• Google DeepMind published research on AI safety alignment
• Mistral raised $600M in Series B funding

Read the full stories at techdigest.io.

Unsubscribe | Manage preferences

subject: Sunday dinner this week?
body:
Hi sweetheart,

Your dad and I were wondering if you're free for dinner on Sunday? I'm making your favorite pasta. Your sister will be here too with the kids.

Let us know! We haven't seen you in a while and miss you.

Love,
Mom

P.S. Can you bring that pie dish you borrowed last month? :)

subject: Your invoice #INV-2026-0312 is ready
body:
Hello,

Your invoice for March 2026 is now available.

Amount: $149.00
Due date: April 1, 2026
Service: CloudService Pro Plan

You can view and download your invoice at: account.cloudservice.com/invoices

If you have billing questions, contact billing@cloudservice.com.

Thank you for your business.

subject: Partnership proposal - collaboration opportunity
body:
Hello,

My name is Alex Rodriguez and I'm the Head of Partnerships at Partner.org. We've been following your work and believe there's a strong alignment between our organizations.

I'd love to schedule a 30-minute call to explore a potential collaboration. We're thinking of a co-marketing initiative that could benefit both our audiences.

Are you available for a call next week? I'm flexible on timing.

Best regards,
Alex Rodriguez
Head of Partnerships, Partner.org

subject: URGENT: Unusual login attempt detected on your account
body:
Security Alert

We detected a login attempt to your account from an unrecognized device.

Location: Lagos, Nigeria
Device: Windows PC
Time: 2026-03-19 11:02 UTC

If this was you, you can ignore this message. If this was NOT you, please secure your account immediately by visiting: account.bankingsecure.com/security

Do not share your password with anyone, including bank employees.

Banking Secure Team

subject: Team meeting tomorrow 9am
body: Hi, reminder that we have the weekly team standup tomorrow at 9am. Please come prepared with your updates. Thanks.
